db
    .prepare('SELECT version, team_code_hash, json FROM lan_host_state WHERE id = 1')
    .get

db.prepare(
    `INSERT INTO lan_host_state (id, version, team_code_hash, json, updated_at)
     VALUES (1, ?, ?, ?, ?)
     ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET
       version = excluded.version,
       team_code_hash = excluded.team_code_hash,
       json = excluded.json,
       updated_at = excluded.updated_at`
  ).run

db
    .prepare(
      `INSERT INTO lan_sync_outbox (room_id, kind, payload_json, enqueued_at)
       VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)`
    )
    .run

db
    .prepare('SELECT COUNT(*) AS c FROM lan_sync_outbox WHERE room_id = ?')
    .get

db.prepare(
      `DELETE FROM lan_sync_outbox
       WHERE id IN (
         SELECT id FROM lan_sync_outbox
         WHERE room_id = ?
         ORDER BY enqueued_at ASC, id ASC
         LIMIT ?
       )`
    ).run

db
    .prepare(
      `SELECT id, kind, payload_json, enqueued_at, attempts, last_error
       FROM lan_sync_outbox
       WHERE room_id = ?
       ORDER BY enqueued_at ASC, id ASC`
    )
    .all
